ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is based */,
  "org_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  "org_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "org_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization that published the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  "pub_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "pub_abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the publication */,
  "pub_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "pub_category" TEXT /* Category or field of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "cite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "cite_date" TEXT /* Date of citation */,
  "cite_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  "cite_page_num" TEXT /* Page number(s) where the citation appears */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "org1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first organization */,
  "org2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second organization */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication resulting from the collaboration */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration */,
  "collab_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "collab_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_org2_id FOREIGN KEY ("org2_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_org1_id FOREIGN KEY ("org1_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being weighted */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the publication */,
  "weight_type" TEXT /* Type of weight assigned */,
  "weight_source" TEXT /* Source of the weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_publications" (
  "user_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-publication pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "user_pub_access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_publications_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_publications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "pub_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication metric */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "num_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  "pub_metric_total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the publication */,
  "pub_metric_average_citations_per_year" REAL /* Average number of citations per year received by the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_metrics" (
  "org_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization metric */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "num_publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the organization */,
  "num_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the organization */,
  "org_metric_total_publications" INTEGER /* Total number of publications by the organization */,
  "org_metric_average_citations_per_publication" REAL /* Average number of citations per publication by the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_metrics_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
